title: Personal Loans | Flexible Repayments Available With CommBank
summary: Apply now for a personal loan, secured or unsecured, for a range of loan purposes. Discover our competitive interest rates, and our discounts for energy efficient loans.

nodes.name: Am I eligible?

nodes.name: Got questions? We’ve got answers
nodes.summary: Got questions? We’ve got answers

nodes.name: What is a personal loan and when is it preferred?
nodes.summary: A personal loan is a type of loan where you can borrow a certain amount of money to use for almost any personal expense and you’ll repay it over time with interest. They are typically used for large p
nodes.content_preview: A personal loan is a type of loan where you can borrow a certain amount of money to use for almost any personal expense and you’ll repay it over time with interest. They are typically used for large p

nodes.name: How much can I borrow with a personal loan?
nodes.summary: Loan amounts typically range from $4,000 to $120,000, depending on the lender and the type of personal loan you’re looking to apply for.
nodes.content_preview: Loan amounts typically range from $4,000 to $120,000, depending on the lender and the type of personal loan you’re looking to apply for.

nodes.name: What are the most common reasons people take out personal loans?
nodes.summary: Top reasons include buying a new or used car, debt consolidation, home improvements, unexpected expenses, holidays, and living expenses.
nodes.content_preview: Top reasons include buying a new or used car, debt consolidation, home improvements, unexpected expenses, holidays, and living expenses.

nodes.name: What’s the difference between a secured and unsecured personal loan?
nodes.summary: Secured personal loans are backed by an asset (e.g. the car you’re buying). This also means you can typically borrow at a lower interest rate. Unsecured personal loans are not backed by any asset. Thi
nodes.content_preview: Secured personal loans are backed by an asset (e.g. the car you’re buying). This also means you can typically borrow at a lower interest rate. Unsecured personal loans are not backed by any asset. Thi

nodes.name: Can I get my personal loan refinanced?
nodes.summary: Yes, you can refinance a personal loan. Refinancing involves taking out a new loan to pay off your existing one, ideally with better terms such as a lower interest rate, reduced monthly repayments, or
nodes.content_preview: Yes, you can refinance a personal loan. Refinancing involves taking out a new loan to pay off your existing one, ideally with better terms such as a lower interest rate, reduced monthly repayments, or

nodes.name: Will applying for a personal loan affect my credit score?
nodes.summary: Yes, it can impact your credit score in either a positive or negative way. Being mindful about your applications and managing your credit responsibly can help keep your score healthy. However, if you
